textByHashes.7995f31f5433ae2c05250283638b4e7170d5ac4e: How am I supposed to get past this?
textByHashes.9fc050c744fd7070ced0416882d8bc0f88723480: Did that owl statue just move?
textByHashes.7dd466bdc21a8e87c3ee8e0e1944aad0dd3c719d: I can't wait until I get full graceful, then I can head back to the rooftop courses.
textByHashes.9e123f2fc6f1addffc2640230d22d4fdef3b59a9: I wonder if the Hallowed grapple is worth it?
textByHashes.ba8d43c838ace249919c0a7b75effd1f92d14f13: I wish I could trade Hallowed marks in for amylase crystals.
textByHashes.918a8934bd120a9d511badaae550fab08ac7caa0: Two pieces dyed, four more to go!
textByHashes.004edaab4763ec3ffab79882fa16184b16044094: Well, this is definitely more difficult than training on rooftop courses.
